assessment.approach: The challenge requires interacting with the Aurora API. Based on the evidence, I must first call POST /api/aurora/open to obtain a runId and a signal value from the channels array. Then, I must use these values to call PUT /api/aurora/close to complete the challenge. I will use the provided header x-gym-benchmark-run for all requests.
evidenceUsed: Exact copy relation between POST response runId and PUT request runId
Exact copy relation between POST response channels[23].signal and PUT request signal
uncertainties: The evidence shows channels[23].signal is used, but the response body is truncated in the raw timeline. I will assume the structure is consistent and extract the signal from the 24th channel (index 23) if available, or fallback to a valid signal from the array.
